case_title: ALABSI, BASHIR C/O ADOPT A BLOCK VS TRINH, NGIAH et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ALABSI, BASHIR C/O ADOPT A BLOCK AS TO DEFENDANT TRINH, NGIAH ELMUFLIHI, TAWFIQ IND/DBA DOBA CAFE HUYNH, LIEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-03-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO OCT-08-1999 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROCESS SERVER DID NOT COME BACK TO GET COPIES OF POS AS PROMISED,GAVE POS FOR 43 CASES TO FANNIE.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ELMUFLIHI, TAWFIQ IND/DBA DOBA CAFE
136 POS TO FANNIE(1ST SET:7;2ND:43;3RD:43;4TH:43), SAME NO.OF COPIES FOR PROCESS SRVR,DIVIDED INTO 4 SETS ALSO,AS GIVEN BY SRVR.
C/O JEFF LAM:PROCESS SERVER PICKED UP HIS POS COPIES(136)ABOUT 9:55AM
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-03-1999, OFF CALENDAR

2ND POS FOR TAWFIQ NOT ACCEPTED BY SYSTEM"POS ON FILE FOR SELECTED PARTY".

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALABSI, BASHIR C/O ADOPT A BLOCK IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TRINH, NGIAH ELMUFLIHI, TAWFIQ IND/DBA DOBA CAFE HUYNH, LIEN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
STATEMENT OF DECISION MAILED TO PLFT AND MAILED TO DEFT IN CASE4 #780116.
